Geopolitics.title: Briscoe holds off Bell in NASCAR’s return to Chicagoland Speedway
Geopolitics.summary: Chase Briscoe (19) drives to the track after making a pit stop during a NASCAR Cup Series auto race at Chicagoland Speedway in Joliet, Ill., Sunday, July 5, 2026. (AP Photo/Nam Y. Huh) 2026-07-06T01:59:29Z JOLIET, Ill. (AP) — Chase Briscoe held off Christopher Bell on Sunday night in NASCAR’s return to Chicagoland Speedway, racing to his first Cup Series victory of the season. Briscoe was followed closely by Bell in the final laps on the 1.5-mile oval about 50 miles southwest of downtown Chicago. But Bell was unable to run down his Joe Gibbs Racing teammate. Geopolitics.title: Paul McCartney performs I Want to Hold Your Hand for first time in 60 years at Taylor Swift wedding
Geopolitics.summary: McCartney reportedly played Beatles No 1 hit at star-studded reception at Madison Square Garden Paul McCartney performed the beloved Beatles No 1 hit I Want to Hold Your Hand for the first time in 60 years at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding. McCartney performed the number at the star-studded reception at Madison Square Garden in New York on Friday, People magazine reported . The track was the Beatles’ first American No 1 hit, sparking Beatlemania in the US and the wave of British bands’ success nicknamed “the British invasion”. Continue reading...
